surface_strategies.navigation: Crystal Glass: bg-[#0A0908]/70 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/10
surface_strategies.cards: Crisp Neumorphic: Flat surface (#12100E) with 1px solid border (#2B2823), subtle ambient shadow.
surface_strategies.hero_overlay: Gradient overlay from bottom to top: bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0A0908] via-[#0A0908]/80 to-transparent
surface_strategies.primary_buttons: Solid primary color (#D4AF37) with text color (#0A0908) to ensure contrast. Hover adds a slight glow drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.4)].

hero_background.description: Abstract golden metallic strands against black background. Use as the hero section background with a heavy gradient overlay.

brand_logo.description: Concentric golden rings on black background. Use as an icon/logo placeholder for Reclaim Africa.

testimonial_or_help.description: Professional black woman looking at phone. Use in the Help Center or a 'Trust' section.

about_team.description: Business professionals collaborating. Use in the Admin login or About/Help page.

specific_page_instructions.landing_page: Avoid standard centered hero text. Use an assertive left-aligned typography block. The tagline 'We only get paid when you get paid' should be visually distinct (e.g., monospace overline or text-primary). Primary button is Solid Gold (#D4AF37) text-black; Secondary is Transparent with Gold Border.
specific_page_instructions.claim_form_multistep: Use a 2-column layout on desktop: Left side (1/3 width) displays the vertical progress tracker with gold active steps and muted grey upcoming steps. Right side (2/3 width) holds the active form step. For Step 1 (Asset type choices), render them as a CSS Grid of clickable cards rather than standard radio buttons. 'Coming soon' options should be visibly disabled (opacity-50) with a lock icon, but still readable.
specific_page_instructions.dashboard: Use a 'Control Room' dense grid approach for 'My Claims'. Claims should appear as high-contrast cards (#12100E) with distinct status badges. The 'Start a New Claim' button should be the prominent, glowing gold action.
specific_page_instructions.help_center: Use an accordion list for FAQs, styled purely with 1px borders (#2B2823). The 'Contact founder' section should feel like a premium personalized concierge card at the bottom, using the team/professional image as a subtle background.
specific_page_instructions.admin_panel: Functional brutalism. Stick strictly to Shadcn tables, dense spacing, and high legibility. Optimize for scanning.

critical_rules: NEVER use pure black (#000000); use the tinted #0A0908 base.
NEVER use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans. Headings MUST be Outfit, body MUST be Manrope.
All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
Do NOT use placeholder image URLs (via.placeholder.com). Only use the image URLs provided in this file.
Never center text blindly; favor left-alignment for dense content and forms.
